meta.name: Nitin Sharma
meta.tagline: Building AI that ships to production.
meta.heroDesc: I'm Nitin Sharma — an AI Engineer with 1+ year of hands-on experience building production-grade LLM applications, agentic systems, and RAG pipelines that reduce operational costs, eliminate manual workflows, and improve decision velocity.

counters.label:
Annual vendor cost
eliminated in 3 months

paragraphs: I graduated from JC Bose University with a B.Tech in Computer Engineering (Data Science) — CGPA 8.68. But what matters more is what I've shipped since.

In just over a year across two companies, I've built production AI systems — a multi-agent financial platform serving 500+ advisors at FNZ, and three distinct AI products at Sonar Technologies — each with measurable, documented business outcomes.
My edge: I own the full stack end-to-end. From LLM orchestration and vector search to ASP.NET/FastAPI backends, Docker deployments, and Azure infra. No handoff needed, faster iteration, fewer gaps.

cards.title: Analyst requests eliminated
cards.desc: Collapsed a 5-step analyst workflow into a single-prompt interaction. Data-to-decision time dropped from hours to under 2 minutes.

cards.title: Booking effort cut
cards.desc: Voice AI agent handling end-to-end appointment scheduling at sub-2s latency. Recovered revenue from missed-booking leakage.

cards.title: Vendor cost eliminated
cards.desc: Replaced a ₹10L/year ($12K) third-party support vendor with an in-house RAG chatbot. Full ROI achieved within 3 months of deployment.

whyPoints: I ship production AI, not demos. Every system I've built is running live — serving 500+ advisors at FNZ, handling real bookings, resolving real support queries.
I own the full stack. LLM orchestration, vector DBs, backend APIs, containers, Azure infra — I don't need a handoff chain. That means faster cycles and no gaps.
I measure business outcomes, not lines of code. 70% fewer analyst requests, ₹10L saved, ROI in 3 months — these are the metrics I optimize for.
I adopt emerging tech at production speed. Pipecat, Agno, MCP, Microsoft Agent Framework — I pick them up and ship them in weeks, not quarters.
I've led delivery, not just contributed. Coordinated a 5-member external team, owned requirements, progress tracking, and end-to-end technical delivery.

services.name: AI Agent Development
services.desc: Custom autonomous agents and multi-agent systems that reason, plan, and act across tools, APIs, and databases. Built for production scale.

services.name: RAG & Knowledge Systems
services.desc: Connect your LLM to your enterprise data. Document Q&A, semantic search, knowledge bases over structured and unstructured data.

services.name: Voice AI Assistants
services.desc: Real-time voice agents for booking, support, and automation. Sub-2s latency, natural TTS, full telephony integration.

services.name: LLM Backend Engineering
services.desc: Production APIs and microservices powering AI features. FastAPI or ASP.NET Core backends, Docker, Azure deployments.

services.name: AI Chatbots & Support Automation
services.desc: Replace expensive support vendors with purpose-built chatbots on your data. Better resolution rates, full data ownership, zero recurring vendor cost.

services.name: BI & Dashboard Automation
services.desc: Natural language to live dashboard. Collapse multi-step analyst workflows into a single prompt interaction.

projects.name: Advisor AI — Multi-Agent Financial Platform
projects.desc: Architected a production multi-agent financial platform serving two concurrent user channels: an advisor-facing engine delivering AI-generated portfolio insights, and a client-facing self-serve financial analysis portal. Serves a 500+ advisor base and eliminates manual reporting overhead entirely.
projects.impact: Eliminated manual reporting overhead for 500+ advisors. Clients self-serve personalised financial analysis without analyst involvement.

projects.name: Natural Language BI Agent
projects.desc: Engineered an NL BI agent resolving 3× the query breadth of legacy BI tooling. Collapsed a 5-step analyst workflow (request → SQL → dashboard → review) into a single-prompt interaction.
projects.impact: 70% reduction in routine analyst requests. Data-to-decision time dropped from hours to under 2 minutes.

projects.name: Voice AI Booking Agent
projects.desc: Real-time voice AI handling end-to-end appointment scheduling autonomously at sub-2s response latency. Pipecat pipeline with Whisper STT, ElevenLabs TTS, and Twilio WebRTC.
projects.impact: 50% reduction in manual booking effort. Recovered revenue from missed-booking leakage. Measurable uplift in booking completion rate.

projects.name: RAG Customer Support Chatbot
projects.desc: Production RAG chatbot replacing a third-party support vendor costing ₹10L/year ($12K). Improved first-contact resolution and absorbed the majority of inbound queries without human escalation.
projects.impact: Full ROI within 3 months. Eliminated ₹10L/year vendor cost. Improved first-contact resolution rate.

projects.name: Employee Management System Bot
projects.desc: Stateful multi-turn HR agent enabling employees to apply for leave, query payroll data, and retrieve profile information through natural language. LangGraph persistent state for multi-step workflows. Direct PostgreSQL tool-calling with p95 query response under 800ms.
projects.impact: 40% reduction in average task completion time vs legacy web portal. Eliminated HR support ticket volume for routine queries.

bullets: Architected Advisor AI — a production multi-agent financial platform using Microsoft Agent Framework, ASP.NET Core, RAG, MCP, and Cosmos DB.
Serves two concurrent channels: advisor-facing engine for AI-generated portfolio insights and a client-facing self-serve financial analysis portal.
Eliminated manual reporting overhead for a 500+ advisor base — advisors no longer manually compile portfolio data before client meetings.

Engineered a natural-language BI agent (Agno, Gemini, Chroma) resolving 3× the query breadth of legacy BI — collapsed 5-step analyst workflow into a single prompt, cutting analyst requests by 70% and decision time from hours to under 2 minutes.
Built a real-time voice AI booking agent (Pipecat, Whisper, ElevenLabs, Twilio WebRTC) at sub-2s latency — reduced manual booking effort by 50%, recovered missed-booking revenue.
Delivered a production RAG support chatbot (LangChain, Gemini, Qdrant, Docker) replacing a ₹10L/year vendor — improved first-contact resolution, full ROI within 3 months.
Coordinated a 5-member external team for the Limousine Pre-Allocation System — owned requirements, progress tracking, and end-to-end technical delivery.

experience.company: J.C. Bose University of Science and Technology, YMCA
bullets: Data Science & GenAI specialization — Coursera Certificate of Excellence, 92.5%.
